headings.usage: All section titles, hero statements. Use italics for emphasis words.

mono.usage: Small labels, dates, technical details (minimal use).

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-12, p-24, p-32. Never cram content.
layout_strategy.alignment: Asymmetric. Offset text blocks. Avoid perfect centering except for Hero.

buttons.primary: bg-sand text-void hover:bg-white transition-all duration-500 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-white/60 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all duration-500 rounded-full px-8 py-4

cards.style: bg-ash/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5 hover:border-sand/30 transition-colors duration-500 p-8 rounded-xl

inputs.style: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 focus:border-sand outline-none py-4 text-lg transition-colors duration-300 placeholder:text-white/20 rounded-none

hero.elements: Full screen video/image background with heavy overlay. Centered serif typography. Dual CTA.

what_is_it.elements: Text on left, abstract shadow image on right (floating).

experience.elements: Grid of 4-5 cards describing the feelings (Silence, Connection, Mirroring).

founder.elements: Video placeholder (aspect-video) with custom play button. Signature-style text.

video_placeholders.founder_note: Use a div with aspect-video, bg-neutral-900, and a centered 'Play' icon in a circle.

guidelines: Text reveal: Slide up + Fade in.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is #e5e5e5 or lighter on dark backgrounds.

instructions_to_main_agent: Configure tailwind.config.js to include the custom colors (void, ash, sand, clay) and fonts.
Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.css: Playfair Display (400,600) and Manrope (300,400,500).
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the page with a smooth scroll provider (Lenis recommended if possible, otherwise standard).
Build the 'Sign Up' form using Shadcn components but styled with the 'inputs.style' defined above (transparent border-b).
Ensure the 'Hero' section feels cinematic - full height, immersive.
The 'Founder's Note' video placeholder must look premium - not just a gray box. Add a subtle border and a custom play button.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
